# Sanjeevani Dental Clinic

> A women-owned dental clinic in Dimapur, Nagaland, India, serving families for over 15 years.
> Rated 4.8/5 on Google (33+ reviews). Four specialist doctors offer general dentistry, root
> canals, crowns, dental implants, braces and clear aligners, teeth whitening, wisdom tooth
> extraction, kids' dentistry and same-day emergency care. Open Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 5 PM.

## Key facts
- Name: Sanjeevani Dental Clinic
- Address: Jain Temple Road, near Ram Janki School, West Yard Colony, Marwari Patti, Dimapur, Nagaland 797112, India
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 70053 78195
- Email: sanjeevanidentaldimapur@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM; closed Sunday
- Booking: WhatsApp-first (https://wa.me/917005378195)
- Google rating: 4.8 out of 5, 33+ reviews

## Doctors
- Dr. Deepika Jain — Dental Surgeon (general & cosmetic dentistry, root canals)
- Dr. Kivibo Awomi — Dental Surgeon (restorative & preventive care)
- Dr. Anovili Chishi — Oral Surgeon (extractions, wisdom teeth, minor surgery)
- Dr. Tisso — Orthodontist (braces & clear aligners)

## Indicative prices (INR, confirmed in writing after examination)
- Consultation & check-up: 200–500
- Teeth cleaning: 800–1,500
- Teeth whitening: 4,000–8,000
- Root canal treatment: 3,000–6,000 per tooth
- Crowns: 1,500–12,000 per unit (metal to zirconia)
- Wisdom tooth extraction: 1,500–6,000
- Dental implants: 25,000–45,000 per tooth
- Braces & aligners: 25,000–1,50,000 full treatment
- Kids' dentistry: 200–3,500
- Emergency consultation: 300–800

- Home: https://sanjeevani-dental-clinic.vercel.app/
- Treatments & prices: https://sanjeevani-dental-clinic.vercel.app/services/

- Blog: https://sanjeevani-dental-clinic.vercel.app/blog/
- Contact & directions: https://sanjeevani-dental-clinic.vercel.app/contact/
- FAQs: https://sanjeevani-dental-clinic.vercel.app/faq/

## Service area
Dimapur, Chumukedima, Kohima, and across Nagaland.
